Epithelial Systems Biology Laboratory (ESBL)


Comprehensive Proteomic Analysis of Rat Renal Inner Medullary Collecting Duct Nuclei

This database reports all proteins identified by mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) in the nuclear extract and/or nuclear pellet of inner medullary collecting duct (IMCD) cells freshly isolated from rat kidneys (NE-PER kit, Thermo). Two samples were analyzed for each fraction, one from IMCD cells treated for 30 minutes with a vasopressin analog (dDAVP, 1 nM) and one from IMCD cells treated with the vehicle (control, CT). This database was created by Christina Pickering, Cameron Grady, Chung-Lin Chou, Pablo Sandoval, and Mark Knepper of the Systems Biology Center, Division of Intramural Research, NHLBI, NIH, Bethesda, Maryland.

Total number of proteins = 8266; total number of proteins identified on the basis of at least two distinct peptides = 5048. Proteins identified in Extract and Pellet = 4316; proteins in Extract only = 1977; proteins in Pellet only = 1973.

Click on the Gene Symbol to reveal Virtual Western Blots for each protein in control samples, mapping MS data to SDS-PAGE gel slices from which they were identified.

The list of proteins identified on the basis of at least two distinct peptides is available here. The database of all transcription factors identified in the Extract and Pellet is available here.

Difference in spectral counts (SC) was tested using the Fisher Exact Test relative to the total spectral counts for all proteins (Extract: CT, 110787; dDAVP, 108171; Pellet: CT, 138631; dDAVP, 142352). For the nuclear extract and nuclear pellet fractions, the p-values represent the probability that a difference in spectral counts between control and dDAVP samples could have been obtained by random selection from all spectra found in the respective fraction.

Download data here. Please address questions to knep@helix.nih.gov

Gene Symbol Annotation Extract CT (SC) Extract dDAVP (SC) Extract dDAVP : CT Ratio Extract p-value Pellet CT (SC) Pellet dDAVP (SC) Pellet dDAVP : CT Ratio Pellet p-value
